overall.description: First-person exploration of a desert shantytown on the outskirts of a futuristic city. The player character walks past abandoned trailers and makeshift structures, encounters an NPC smoking on a balcony, and continues through the dusty compound toward other inhabitants. Cyberpunk 2077 game footage with high-fidelity graphics.

agents.ego_description: walking past chain link fence and abandoned trailer toward a stilted wooden house

entered.detail: rusted metal fence partially obstructing view of trailer
abandoned recreational vehicle with solar panels on roof
elevated wooden structure with external staircase
steep metal staircase leading to upper balcony
futuristic glass towers with NC signage visible in distance
dry bushes and desert plants scattered on dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dusty desert shantytown with abandoned trailers and makeshift fencing. The camera moves forward past a rusted RV toward a wooden house on stilts, with the futuristic Night City skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: external metal staircase of stilt house

events.description: begins ascending metal stairs to upper balcony

agents.ego_description: climbing the external metal staircase to reach the upper level balcony

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt and cowboy hat standing on balcony near red door

entered.detail: dark red entrance door at top of stairs
metal safety railing along staircase and platform

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the metal staircase of the stilt house, approaching an NPC in a red shirt standing on the balcony. The view shifts to show the wooden facade and red door of the structure.

events.description: NPC takes a drag from cigarette and exhales smoke
turns to descend stairs back to ground level

agents.ego_description: standing on balcony observing the NPC smoking and looking out at the city view before turning to leave

notable_agents.action: man in cowboy hat smoking a cigarette and leaning on railing

entered.detail: weathered wooden window shutters on house exterior

segments.scene_description: On the balcony, the camera observes the smoking NPC leaning against the railing with Night City visible in the background. The NPC exhales smoke before the camera turns to descend the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial compound with water tanks and sheds

events.description: descends metal stairs back to ground level
moves from open yard to industrial building entrance area

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and exploring the compound around industrial sheds and water tanks

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal water storage tank on concrete base
corrugated metal industrial building with flat roof
window emitting green light on industrial building
vertical metal ladder attached to building exterior
piles of red metal construction beams and materials

segments.scene_description: Back on the ground, the camera explores the compound passing a cylindrical water tank and industrial metal sheds. The camera approaches a building with a green-lit window before turning the corner past stacked construction materials.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert lot with wrecked vehicles and radio tower

events.description: approaches two NPCs standing near final trailer

agents.ego_description: walking through open desert area past wrecked cars toward a trailer with two people

notable_agents.action: two women standing and conversing near a mobile home entrance

entered.detail: rusted and stripped vehicles scattered across desert lot
tall metal communications tower with multiple antennas
single-wide trailer with steps leading to entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open desert lot scattered with wrecked vehicles and construction debris, passing a tall radio tower. It approaches a final mobile home where two women stand conversing near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dusty desert shantytown that transitions from a desolate perimeter to a populated residential compound. It begins by moving past rusted RVs and makeshift fencing toward a wooden house on stilts, with the distant Night City skyline framing the horizon. As the camera ascends a metal staircase, the perspective shifts toward an NPC in a red shirt smoking on a balcony before descending back to the ground. The scene then opens up to explore the industrial compound, passing a cylindrical water tank and green-lit windows before turning past stacked construction materials. Finally, the camera glides through an open lot scattered with wrecked vehicles and a tall radio tower, arriving at a mobile home where two women stand conversing.
